title: Low-profile, broad-bandwidth, dual-polarization dipole radiating element
abstract: An antenna having a first dipole element configured to emit or receive electromagnetic signals in a first polarization direction wherein the first dipole is fed by a first inclined balun and a second dipole element configured to emit or receive electromagnetic signals in a second polarization direction that is orthogonal to the first polarization direction wherein the second dipole is fed by a second inclined balun.
claims: Claims ( 19 ) AnĂ‚Â antennaĂ‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â dipoleĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â emitĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â receiveĂ‚Â electromagneticĂ‚Â signalsĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â polarizationĂ‚Â direction,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â dipoleĂ‚Â hasĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â inclinedĂ‚Â balunĂŻÂĽÂ›Ă‚Â and aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â dipoleĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â emitĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â receiveĂ‚Â electromagneticĂ‚Â signalsĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â polarizationĂ‚Â direction,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â polarizationĂ‚Â directionĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â orthogonalĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â polarizationĂ‚Â direction,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â dipoleĂ‚Â hasĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â inclinedĂ‚Â balun.
